english-amy.text: Welcome! This entire voice runs in under four megabytes, with no cloud at all.
It's a bright, clear morning. A perfect day to build something small and useful.

english-kristin.text: Welcome! This entire voice runs in under four megabytes, with no cloud at all.
It's a bright, clear morning. A perfect day to build something small and useful.

vietnamese.text: Xin chào! Rất vui được gặp bạn hôm nay.
Sáng nay trời đẹp, chúng ta cùng bắt đầu ngày mới nhé.

indonesian.text: Halo! Senang bertemu dengan Anda hari ini.
Pagi ini cuaca cerah, mari kita mulai hari dengan semangat.

nepali.text: आज बिहान मौसम राम्रो छ, नयाँ दिन सुरु गरौं।

hindi.text: नमस्ते! आपसे मिलकर बहुत खुशी हुई।
आज सुबह मौसम बहुत सुहावना है, चलिए दिन की शुरुआत करते हैं।

chinese.text: 你好！很高兴今天见到你。
今天早上天气很好，我们开始新的一天吧。
